name: FlexItem
description: Control size and cross-axis alignment of an item in flex layouts.

as.description: Renders the flex item as a semantic HTML element instead of a div.

align.description: Overrides parent cross-axis alignment for this item.

grow.description: Controls how much this item expands relative to siblings.

shrink.description: Controls how much this item shrinks relative to siblings.

basis.description: Sets the initial main-axis size before grow/shrink is applied.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the item.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing inside the item.

slots.children: Content rendered inside the flex item.

accessibility.role: varies by `as` element and containing layout context
aria: Prefer semantic HTML via `as` for accessible structure (for example `li` inside lists)
Apply ARIA attributes according to the semantic element and surrounding UI pattern

inside: Semantically structured lists when used with `as`
